meta.title: Webovky · websites for small businesses in SK & CZ
meta.description: Modern, fast and personal websites for small businesses. Done in 14 days, fixed price, no monthly fees.

announcement.text: Taking 2 new projects in May. Reserve a slot

hero.label: Webstudio · Bratislava & Prague
hero.sub: Modern, fast and personal websites for small businesses — salons, cafés, physio clinics, photographers and more. Done in 14 days, fixed price, no monthly fees.

stats.label3: locations I work from (SK + CZ + AT)

intro.label: What I do
intro.title: Websites for people who don't want to deal with tech
intro.text: You tell me what you do and who your clients are. I build a website that brings you bookings, emails and phone calls — without you needing to understand what hosting or an SSL cert means.

services.label: Services
services.title: Turnkey websites. No surprises.
services.lead: Six areas where I can really help. Pick what you need — or let me decide what makes the most sense.

s1.title: Design + dev + launch
s1.text: From the first call to live domain. I handle everything — you control the content.

s2.title: Modernizing an old site
s2.text: A 2015 website holds you back. I'll build a new one and keep your URLs so you don't lose Google ranking.

s3.title: So locals find you
s3.text: Google Maps, schema.org, local keywords like „hairdresser Bratislava city center“.

s4.title: Clients book themselves
s4.text: Reservio, Booksy, SimplyBook or a custom Tally form. Zero work for you.

s6.title: SK + CZ + EN switcher
s6.text: Just like this website. Perfect for businesses serving international clients too.

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.title: Four templates for four different industries
portfolio.lead: These are demos for 4 business types. We pick one as a base and customize for you. That saves 60–70 % of the typical website cost.

p1.title: Salón Lumi
p1.text: Classic salon site with gallery, pricing, online booking via Reservio and a floating WhatsApp button.

p2.title: Café Luna
p2.text: For cafés that also live on Instagram. Menu, opening hours, brunch card and photos.

p3.title: Fyzio Plus
p3.text: For private physio clinics. Conditions, therapies, online booking and the therapist's profile.

p4.title: Studio Novák
p4.text: An editorial website for a wedding / portrait photographer. Big galleries, packages, contact form.

step1.title: Free 20-minute call
step1.text: I learn what you do, who your clients are and what the site needs to achieve. No sales pitch.

step2.title: Proposal & quote
step2.text: I send a concrete offer with a fixed price and the template I propose as a starting point.

step3.title: Materials
step3.text: Texts and photos. I can write the texts for you and source photos from Unsplash or arrange a photographer.

step4.title: Build
step4.text: I send a preview link, you send feedback. 1–2 rounds of revisions are included.

step5.title: Launch
step5.text: Domain hooked up (or bought for you). Google Maps, schema, Search Console. The site goes live.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent packages, no asterisks
pricing.lead: Fixed prices, not hours. You always know what you'll pay. Prices are pre-VAT (not yet registered).
pricing.addons: Plus one-off: domain .sk/.cz ~€15/year · hosting €0–6/month depending on site type.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: You often ask
faq.q1: I have a domain and an old site. Can you do something with that?
faq.a1: Yes. Either I migrate the domain to a new website, or I redesign on your existing host. Depends on the tech — usually I can migrate without downtime.
faq.q2: What photos will you use if I don't have any?
faq.a2: For the first version we use styled photos from Unsplash (legal, free). We replace them with yours later. On higher tiers I can arrange a photographer at a fair price.
faq.q3: Will I be able to make edits myself?
faq.a3: On the Pro and Plus tiers — yes. I set it up so editing texts, prices or gallery is doable in a simple interface. Or write me and I'll handle it under maintenance.
faq.q4: What if I don't like the result?
faq.a4: Before we start I send a clear offer with a reference. After the first preview you have 1–2 included revision rounds. If we really miss the mark, I refund 50 % of the deposit and we part on good terms.
faq.q5: Do you also work for businesses outside beauty?
faq.a5: Yes, any service — auto repair, physio, tutoring, small restaurants. These templates are demos, not limitations.

cta_band.title: Got an idea? Let's talk.
cta_band.text: Free 20-minute call via Google Meet or phone. No commitment, no pressure.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Drop me a short note
contact.text: One line is enough — what you do and what your current site looks like. I reply within 24 hours.

form.name: Your name
form.ok: Opening your email client. If nothing happens, write me directly.

footer.tagline: Websites for small businesses in SK and CZ. Done in 14 days.
footer.newsletter_text: One email a month with one concrete tip to improve your website or Google visibility. No spam.

cookies.text: This site uses cookies to improve your experience and gather anonymous stats.
